pi_items.source: scripts/direct_db_setup.sh:93 and scripts/setup_opensis.sh:164 - both insert schools table with id=1 for 'Demo School'
task.json description and setup_task.sh:18 (DELETE ... WHERE short_name IN ('7', '8', '07', '08')) confirms these are the intended new grades
scripts/direct_db_setup.sh:144-148 and scripts/setup_opensis.sh:173 both show the initial INSERT for school_gradelevels with these exact grades and sort_order values 1,2,3,4
scripts/direct_db_setup.sh:9, scripts/setup_opensis.sh:146, export_result.sh:24, all consistently use 'opensis_user' as the database username
scripts/direct_db_setup.sh:10, scripts/setup_opensis.sh:146, export_result.sh:25, all consistently use 'opensis_password_123' as the database password
scripts/direct_db_setup.sh:8, scripts/setup_opensis.sh:145, export_result.sh:26, all consistently use 'opensis' as the database name
scripts/direct_db_setup.sh:144 shows INSERT INTO school_gradelevels (...). Verified in setup_opensis.sh:173, export_result.sh:32, verifier.py uses this table name
scripts/direct_db_setup.sh:144 shows explicit columns: (id, school_id, short_name, title, sort_order) in INSERT statement
scripts/install_opensis.sh:12 states 'OpenSIS v9.2 Student Information System'. scripts/direct_db_setup.sh:3 comments 'Based on actual table structures from OpenSIS v9.2 schema'
task.json:5-6 provides credentials. scripts/setup_opensis.sh:157 and scripts/direct_db_setup.sh:12 confirm these are used for OpenSIS login

pi_items.verified_value: OpenSIS is a real, open-source Student Information System created by OS4ED, actively maintained on GitHub (OS4ED/openSIS-Classic), used by thousands of schools globally
pi_items.source: Web search and GitHub repository verification: https://github.com/OS4ED/openSIS-Classic confirms it is a legitimate, publicly available education software system licensed under GNU General Public License

privileged_info_summary: This task uses OpenSIS v9.2, a real open-source Student Information System. The environment is configured with school_id=1 ('Demo School') containing existing grades 9-12 with sort_order values 1-4 respectively in the school_gradelevels table. The task requires adding Grade 7 (short_name='7', title='Grade 7') and Grade 8 (short_name='8', title='Grade 8') with appropriate sort_order values. Database credentials are opensis_user / opensis_password_123, and admin login is admin / Admin@123. All metadata claims have been verified against the setup scripts and OpenSIS documentation. The data used (Demo School, sample grades) is synthetic test data created for this environment.
